message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "model" {
    folder data {
        frame source {
            class Collector <<(A,#ADD1B2)>> #line:green;line:brown;text:red;bold;fontSize=30# {
                +Collector() : void
                -getDatumLinkListByTree(): List<Datum>
                -getEntityDescription(entityName): String?
                -getEntityName(datum: Datum?): String?
                -getQualifiers(urlString?: URL?, entityName?: String?) = null
                -getReferenceLinksFromHtml(htmlText)
                -getSingleStatement(linkUrlStrng, qualifierMap=null)
                -triggerLoad()
                -triggerSave()
                
                getReferences(refsToGet: Set<String>) 
                    if refsToGet.isEmpty return emptySet
                
                getStatements(linksAndRefs: Map<URL, Collection<String>>)
                    
                triggerLoad(loadAll=false)
            
            }
        
            WebCollector --|> Collector
        
            LocalRepository o-- Collector
            
            note right of Collector::+references\n- referencesLoaded \n  -> false
              The set of reference names to be retrieved from each page.\nIf this field is not initialized before calling load(),\nit will default to an empty list which means all links on pages are followed,\neven those pointing outside the domain being crawled. This can lead to infinite loops!
              
            endnote 
            
            class RepositoryInterface {\n<<interface>>}
    
            abstract class AbstractLocalRepository implements RepositoryInterface
    
            concreteclass ConcreteFileBasedRepo extends AbstractLocalRepository 
    
            File f --> |uses|ConcreteFileBasedRepo 

            Database db <|--[hidden]--> FileSystem fs


             // Define relationships between classes here...
             
           /* Example usage scenario */
           
          User u uses Application app via Controller c connected through Service s accessing Data d stored in DBMS system managed by Admin admin who monitors performance metrics collected using
